description_long: This traffic barricade is a modular, rectangular structure composed of three main panels separated by four vertical posts. The panels feature a grid-like pattern of recessed squares, giving the surface a reinforced, industrial appearance. The entire object is a uniform light gray color, suggesting it is made from precast concrete or a similar material. The posts are slightly thicker than the panels and extend above the top edge, providing additional stability and visual segmentation. The barricade is solid and robust, designed to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from passing through. There are no visible openings, signage, or reflective markings on its surface.
description: A solid, light gray modular traffic barricade with three grid-patterned panels and four thick vertical posts, made to block passage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the barricade with three grid-patterned panels and four posts.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the barricade, with one post and the edge of a panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the same grid pattern and post arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the end post.
